summary: After failed benzodiazepines and ongoing seizures indicating refractory status epilepticus, continuous intravenous anesthesia is required. Midazolam is recommended as the首选 agent due to its established effectiveness, rapid onset/offset, and lower risk of respiratory depression compared to alternative medications such as phenobarbital or carbamazepine.
